notes: **SOIC-16 narrow** — both TPL7407L (C383290) and ULN2003A (C2358) ship in 150 mil narrow SOIC. NOT SOIC-16W (300 mil) — pads will not bridge the IC's leads.

**Replaces HT7833** — HT7833 is 6.5 V max VIN, would be destroyed at 12 V. LDL1117S33 is 40 V max VIN, 1.2 A. Dissipation at 55 mA = 0.48 W; SOT-223 with copper pour heatsink (~1 cm² on bottom layer GND tab) holds Tj < 50 °C above ambient.

3-pin header for external hall module on flying lead. **Pinout LOCKED: pin 1 = +3V3, pin 2 = GND, pin 3 = HALL_OUT** (KY-003 native order — v1 cable plugs straight in). Sensor positioned by chassis bracket relative to flap drum magnet.
VGS rated only ±12 V — at 12 V brick the gate-source margin is zero. Z1 12 V Zener clamp REQUIRED to keep AO3401 in spec under brick tolerance + transients.
Q1 VGS clamp — cathode → source (PCB-12V), anode → gate node. Required for AO3401A within ±12 V VGS rating.
Q1 gate series resistor (slows turn-on; isolates Z1 clamp current)
Unidirectional. Cathode (banded) → +12V, anode → GND. Reversed = forward-bias = dead short.

**Through-hole mount** (NOT SMD). Primary: Mill-Max 0906-2 (5 mm free / 1-1.4 mm travel / 1.07 mm Au tip / 2 A / 1M cycles). Backup: 0906-1. LCSC fallback: Xinyangze YZ02015095R-01 (C5157439) with current derate. **4 pins only — no PG_KEY 5th polarization pogo** (collided with PG1; polarization moved to DIN clip).

**Asymmetric clip is the ONLY polarization mechanism** — only one orientation engages the rail. Bolts via 4× M3 holes at unit board (3,3) (3,77) (37,77) (37,3). One printed per unit (64 + spares). MakerWorld STL link in build notes.

column8: pin 5 = +12 V common (red wire). 5-pin avoids 64× hand-splicing the +12 V wire into the chassis harness.

notes: 12 V input bulk — 1206 required for X7R availability at 22 uF / 25 V; 0805 in this combination is effectively vaporware on JLC
DE driver line series (PA12 → SN65HVD75 DE; /RE tied to GND so no R_re)
